items.name: Meigum Petit Gummy - Ramune
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy the refreshing taste of ramune, Japan's popular carbonated drink, in candy form! These sugar-coated gummy candies are elastic and won't stick to your hands.

items.name: Tohato Beano Edamame Snacks - Camembert Cheese
items.merchantDescription: Indulge in the rich flavor of Camembert cheese in this crunchy edamame snack! It's made from 100% peas and a hint of black pepper to enhance the cheesy taste.

items.name: Yachimata Ginger Ginger Ale Candy Drops
items.merchantDescription: Stash away this tin of ginger ale drops in your candy cabinet! Each piece gives you the sugar rush you need for the day. Share some of these delectable candies with your family and friends if you'd like!

items.name: Pringles Potato Chips - Butter Caramel
items.merchantDescription: Save this tube of potato chips for your upcoming movie marathon! These chips have a sweet and buttery caramel flavor. Share them with your friends!

items.name: Lion Japanese Fruits Throat Lozenges - Melon & Hyuganatsu
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy the taste of Japans seasonal fruits with this refreshing throat candy! Made with juicy Furano melon, zesty Miyazaki Hyuganatsu, and a blend of herbal extracts, it's a soothing treat for your throat!

items.name: Koeda Chocolate - Uji Matcha
items.merchantDescription: These chocolate treats are called koeda in Japanese because they look like twigs! Enjoy the authentic Uji matcha taste of these chocolate sticks. Each stick is made with a combination of matcha chocolate, rice puffs, and biscuits.

items.name: Koikeya Strong Potato Chips - Plum Feast
items.merchantDescription: Get ready for a flavor feast with this bag of potato chips! It's packed with strong and tangy plum flavor that's made with a mix of red shiso, green shiso, and plum meat. Each bite is made even better with a touch of umami from bonito flakes!

items.name: Bourbon Blanchul Langue De Chat Cookies - First Harvest Matcha

items.name: UHA Tokuno Milk 8.2 High Concentrated Soft Milk Candy

items.name: Dars Stick Drink - White Chocolate
items.merchantDescription: Indulge in the creamy sweetness of this instant hot drink! It's inspired by the smooth and rich flavor of Dars white chocolate, blending milk with a hint of cocoa. Just mix with hot water for a comforting chocolatey treat! Contains 4 x stick packets

items.name: Glico Kobe Strawberry Fondant Chocolate
items.merchantDescription: Indulge yourself with his box of delicious strawberry chocolates. Each piece is made of rich cacao and has a ganache-like fondant center filling. Enjoy the luxurious combination of strawberry chocolate with delicious ganache!

items.name: Tohato Tyrant Habanero Potato Rings Share Pack
items.merchantDescription: This large pack of spicy potato ring snacks is perfect for movie nights! Enjoy the combination of chili peppers, onion, chicken, garlic, and spice with every bite. You'll be addicted to these potato ring treats!

items.name: Bourbon Nama Chocolate - Rich Milk
items.merchantDescription: Indulge in this limited-edition box of nama chocolates! Nama means raw in Japanese, referring to the pureness and freshness of the chocolate used in this treat. It's mixed with a rich milk flavor and a subtle butter aroma for a mellow taste! Contains 2 packs x

items.name: UHA Mikakuto Ninja Meshi Steel Gummy - Golden Peach
items.merchantDescription: Have fun chewing on this firm gummy candy that's shaped like oval gold coins! It's made with golden peach juice. The shape and flavor are perfect for this candy's gold treasure theme!

items.name: Tohato Hard Potato Rings - Dashi Soy Sauce
items.merchantDescription: Nibble on these hard, jagged potato rings! They're super crunchy and addictive. Each piece is coated in a powder that combines the umami of bonito flakes, kelp, scallop dashi, and soy sauce.

items.name: Eitaro Ramune Candy
items.merchantDescription: Ramune is a popular carbonated soft drink in Japan. Enjoy the taste of ramune with this pack of candy! Each naturally-colored piece has mints inside them. Add this pack of special ramune candy to your secret stash of sweets.

items.name: Orion Ume Mints Gummy
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy the sweet and tart taste of these plum-flavored gummies! They're made in the style of Orion's popular mint candies, Ume Mints. Stash them together with your other candies in your cupboard.

items.name: Shoei Delicy Adult Crunch - Cookies & Cream

items.name: Glico Kratz Corn Snacks - Edamame
items.merchantDescription: Share this pack of corn snacks with your friends while drinking your favorite brand of beer! Each piece is made to taste like delicious edamame beans. They're mixed with salted almonds to add texture and variety.

items.name: Koikeya Don Tacos Corn Chips - Christmas Chilli Tacos
items.merchantDescription: Share this pack of taco-flavored corn chips with your friends during Christmas! These chips combine the taste of meat, tomatoes, and spices all together. Its the perfect treat for movie night with your buds.

items.name: Sanko Seika Cheese Almond Crackers - Dolce Cheesecake
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy these tasty cheese almond crackers with your favorite warm drink! They're topped with cream cheese and almonds with well-balanced rich and tangy flavors. Contains 15 pieces

items.name: Asahi Mintia Mints - Setoka Orange
items.merchantDescription: Have a taste of Setoka oranges from Japan with this pack of mints. It's the perfect treat to nibble on while walking around the park! Share some with your friends. Contents: 50 pcs of mint

items.name: Bourbon Every Burger Mini Biscuit Sandwiches - Choco Banana
items.merchantDescription: Share this box of yummy biscuit sandwiches with your family and friends. They look just like mini burgers! At the center of each chocolate cocoa biscuit sandwich is smooth banana chocolate.

items.name: Bourbon Every Burger Mini Biscuit Sandwiches - Double Cheese
items.merchantDescription: These yummy biscuit sandwiches look just like tiny little burgers. Each piece is made up of cheese biscuits with a center made of smooth cream cheese. Snack on these tasty little treats when you're hungry!

items.name: Tohato Giza Potato Chips - Butter Soy Sauce
items.merchantDescription: Open this pack of wavy potato chips during movie night with your buddies! It combines the rich taste of butter with the umami of soy sauce and scallops. Each bite just makes you want to eat more and more!

items.merchantDescription: Experience the delicate taste of spring with this pack of melt-in-your-mouth chocolates! They're made with real cherry blossoms and cherry leaf powder to create a mild sweetness and floral aroma. Each piece is individually wrapped, so it's perfect for sharing!

items.merchantDescription: Treat yourself to this pack of cocoa crepe treats. Each piece is coated in white chocolate to remind you of the classic "cookies cream" ice cream! These treats are also sprinkled with salt to help bring out the mellow sweetness of the chocolate.

items.name: Aerial Corn Snacks - Wasabi
items.merchantDescription: Give yourself the kick you need during snack time with this pack of corn snacks. Each four-layered piece is coated in wasabi powder which has a tangy spiciness! This wasabi powder is mixed with the sweet and savory taste of soy sauce.

items.name: Meiji Macadamia Chocolate - Uji Matcha

items.name: Bourbon Anpan Bread Snacks - Azuki Milk

items.name: Yaokin Galitto Politto Pretzels - Tom Yum

items.name: UHA Mikakuto Rainbow Ramune Candy - Grape
items.merchantDescription: Ramune is a popular carbonated soft drink in Japan. Now you can have a taste with this pack of rainbow-colored ramune candies! They have a delicious grape flavor. Enjoy the crisp texture and the fruity aroma of grapes that spreads with every bite.

items.name: Bourbon Sharimoni Gummy Candy - Cola
items.merchantDescription: These soft but chewy gummy candies have a refreshing cola flavor paired with sweet and sour crunchy powder coating! They also contain dietary fiber so you can munch on these gummies guilt-free.

items.merchantDescription: Brace yourself for this gummy candy's intense sour taste! It's a hard gummy that features a strong suppa or super lemon flavor and is packed with vitamin C.

items.merchantDescription: This pack of potato sticks was made to celebrate the 40th anniversary of Koikeya! Enjoy snacking on these spicy potato snacks. They combine the taste of meat and vegetables together with chili peppers.

items.name: Tohato Harvest Smile Super Thin Biscuit Bag - Caramel Banana
items.merchantDescription: Treat yourself to this limited-edition bag of thin biscuits! Each piece combines the rich taste of banana and caramel. Share these yummy treats with your family and friends. Total of 8 pouches with 4 biscuits each

items.name: Tohato Puckle Corn Puff Snack - Rich Curry
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy the taste of Japan's classic curry with this crunchy corn puff snack! It's seasoned with the savory, rich blend of aromatic spices and umami-packed curry.

items.merchantDescription: This limited-edition gummy comes from a collaboration between UHA Mikakuto and Japan's number 1 breakdancer, Shigekix! It features an energy drink flavor that will give you a boost of energy.

items.name: Tohato Kotsubu Moroko Corn Rings Snack - Butter / 4 pcs
items.merchantDescription: Have fun munching on this easy-to-eat snack! It comes in mini packs that you can share with your friends. This crispy corn snack is shaped like mini rings and has the rich flavor of butter. Total of 4 mini packs

items.merchantDescription: Allow yourself to indulge after a hearty meal with this jampacked chocolate bar! Its filled with roasted almonds, crushed cocoa and butter cookies, rice puffs, and sweet caramel. This delicious choco bar is the perfect snack during quick breaks!

items.name: UHA Sakeru Split Gummy Candy - Muscat

items.merchantDescription: Serve these yummy chocolate biscuits at your next party! They look like mini burgers but they're actually made of vanilla-flavored white chocolate sandwiched between cocoa biscuits.

items.name: Koikeya Don Tacos Tortilla Chips - Grilled Corn
items.merchantDescription: Serve this bag of crunchy tortilla chips at your next party! These tasty chips have a rich, sweet taste of grilled corn, enhanced by a hint of fragrant soy sauce.

items.name: Bourbon Alfort White Chocolate Biscuits

items.name: Meigum Beware of Sour Lemons Gummy
items.merchantDescription: Meigum's iconic sour lemon candy is back, but now in gummy form and even more sour! Every piece of these chewy lemon gummies is coated in super sour powder. Dare to try these sour gummies!

items.merchantDescription: Enjoy the delicious taste of yokan, Japan's traditional jelly candy! This bite-sized treat uses Rio red grapefruit juice for a refreshing pink grapefruit flavor.

items.merchantDescription: This refreshing gummy candy comes from the second collaboration between UHA Mikakuto and Japan's number 1 breakdancer, Shigekix! It features a sweet and sour white soda flavor and comes in a resealable pouch to maintain its freshness.
